name: Donna Edwards
subject: When my alarm goes off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend, every time my alarm goes off at 5:00 AM or I get home late, I think about what we're fighting for.
For paid leave for the mom who gets up even _earlier_ and needs a day off when her kid gets sick. For debt-free college for the student who has taken out all those loans and just wants to get a job and build a life free of that crushing debt. And for a second chance for the young man or woman who made a mistake -- and needs a system that allows them to rebuild their life.
I'm criss-crossing this state, working my heart out to reach every voter with this message, but we're still being outspent and falling short of the resources we need to win this tough race, friend.
**Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or more tonight so we can win this election in four days and make the progress we need for our families? We 're running out of time and there are still a lot of undecided voters:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Rubio, GOP Senate candidates on board if Trump is the nominee
[Pitch in now to stop them >>](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23d9/738133e4/35e778fa/7f822ec5/2509103766/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160422a?refcode=pme160422_a&recurring=true&amount=25")**
Friends -- After a devastating primary loss, Marco Rubio is jumping on the bigoted, anti-woman, anti-everything train: **he just admitted he 'll back Donald Trump if he becomes the GOP nominee!**

And what do Florida GOP Senate candidates David Jolly, Todd Wilcox, and Carlos Beruff have in common with Marco? _They 've all said they'd support Trump too!_

The GOP has truly become the party of Trump. We've got to defeat them where it matters -- right here in Florida. [**Will you pitch in now to retake Rubio 's seat and turn the Senate blue?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23d9/738133e4/35e778fa/7f822ec5/2509103766/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160422a?refcode=pme160422_a&recurring=true&amount=25")

Rubio and his GOP buddies must have missed this news: _Sabato 's Crystal Ball _predicts that **if Trump is at the top of the GOP ticket, Florida 's senate seat moves from toss-up to lean Democratic! **And Trump is marching closer and closer to the nomination.

**If you 're NOT with Trump, chip in now, and let's seize this opportunity to shut down Trump's Florida fan club and take back the Senate for Democrats.**

name: John Kasich
subject: NH voter's want John Kasich to be GOP nominee
body:
A new poll was released yesterday in New Hampshire (a key swing
state) that showed a few very important stats and highlights why
it's so critical that we continue gathering delegates before the
convention.

Peter - a new poll was released
yesterday in New Hampshire (a key swing state) that showed a few
very important stats and highlights why it's so critical that we
continue gathering delegates before the convention.

1. In a head-to-head matchup with
Hillary Clinton, I'm the only candidate who can defeat her.

Poll Results:

Kasich 50, Clinton 36 (Kasich
+14)

Trump 31, Clinton 50 (Trump -19)

Cruz 34, Clinton 48 (Cruz -14)

2. From WMUR: "There is a degree
of "buyer's remorse" among Republican Primary voters as 26% want
Kasich to be the nominee, 22% want Trump, 9% want Cruz, 9% want
Marco Rubio, 4% want Paul Ryan, 4% want Mitt Romney, 3% want Rand
Paul, 2% want Carly Fiorina, and 2% want Jeb Bush."

Peter - our Party has a serious
choice to make:

Do we want to win the White House
and keep the U.S. Senate or lose both?

With a Trump/Cruz nomination,
we'd lose the White House, our majority in the U.S. Senate, the
Supreme Court and countless other races around the country!

Peter - I need your support
right now.

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

>> CHIP IN $250 <<

Here's the good news:

It's not too late to nominate the
one candidate who can unify the party and that 15 polls in a row
show defeats Hillary Clinton every time.

We have five critical primaries
on Tuesday and not only am I better positioned than Cruz to win
delegates, but it'll also give us the momentum we need to head
into the convention and win!

Peter, it's now or never to
stop Trump and get to the convention. Please consider chipping in
with $25 or whatever you can right now to help!

Thanks for your support. Let's
win!
John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

DONATE

for America

name: Team Sestak
subject: PoliticsPA two years ago: Why Joe Sestak Will Be the Democratic Nominee
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719817/3476a20e/d925c06/27427f4e/3068943997/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, well before the Senate campaign kicked off, an article in PoliticsPA listed the reasons why Joe would win both the Democratic nomination and November's general election. With four days to go to the primary, we've listed the key reasons from the article below, summarized in the word "_overperforms_." [Could we first ask you to help Joe "overperform" once again this Tuesday, contributing whatever you can to help Joe continue to do the following:](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719817/3476a20e/d925c06/27427f4d/3068943997/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0422FB1p1&amounts=10,20,40,100,300,500,1000") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719817/3476a20e/d925c06/27427f4c/3068943997/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0422FB1b1&amounts=10,20,40,100,300,500,1000")
---
**1. "Joe Sestak has overperformed in every election he has run"**
* In Joe's first election, he ran against a 20 year sitting Republican congressman to win by 12% in a district with 70% more Republicans than Democrats.
* Because of his stellar constituent work, he won re-election by 20% by only using $30,000 dollars on yard signs - no media ads.
* He beat the longest serving Pennsylvanian Senator Arlen Specter by 8%.
* In a huge GOP Tea Party swing year where 4 Pennsylvanian Democratic Congressmen and the Democratic gubernatorial candidate lost their re-election/election by an average margin of almost 10%, Joe narrowly lost by 2%.

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719817/3476a20e/d925c06/27427f4b/3068943997/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0422FB1b2&amounts=10,20,40,100,300,500,1000")
---
**2.** "**Sestak is the hardest-working candidate in Pennsylvanian politics "**
* After his narrow loss, Sestak went to each of Pennsylvania 67 counties to thank his vast network of volunteers.
* He has worked tirelessly to add on to his already robust grassroots network, holding 400 events for local democratic candidates.

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719817/3476a20e/d925c06/27427f4a/3068943997/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0422FB1b3&amounts=10,20,40,100,300,500,1000")
---
**3. "Joe Sestak's ... independence is an asset."**
"Those members of the Democratic establishment cool to Sestak's candidacy have demonstrated in past several state wide elections in Pennsylvania [attorney general to governor] a complete inability to win primaries."
* Joe is no stranger to not receiving the Democratic establishment support, including the 2010 primary election against Senator Spector - and this primary election is no different.

Having won without the party establishment's backing, Joe is now up 6 points in yesterday's F&M poll, on his way to overperforming on Tuesday, again - if we have your help!

name: Maryland for Bernie
subject: Join Bernie in Baltimore on Saturday
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
Bernie is coming to Baltimore on Saturday to hold "A Future to Believe In" rally with special guests Danny Glover and Ben Jealous. Join us for a conversation about the issues that matter: **making college tuition-free, getting big money out of politics, combating climate change, and much more**.
We need everyone to get involved to make this event a success. Can Bernie count on you to join him?
**A Future to Believe In Rally with Bernie Sanders
Saturday, April 23**
Doors open at 10:00 am
Druid Hill Park, Rawlings Conservatory Charm City North Lawn
3100 Swan Dr, Baltimore, MD
**[RSVP NOW](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh")**
[**Click here for more details and to RSVP »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh")
This event is free and open to the public. Tickets are not required, but an RSVP is strongly encouraged. Admission is first come, first served. For security reasons, please do not bring bags, and limit what you bring to small personal items like keys and cell phones. Weapons, sharp objects, chairs, and signs or banners on sticks will not be allowed through security.
Across the country, thousands of people are coming out to be a part of our movement. **Together, we are uniting to say, "Enough is enough. It's time to take back our country."**
Look forward to seeing you there!
Maryland for Bernie

name: Russ Feingold
subject: This Earth Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Wisconsin has long been an environmental leader. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf427f/1c469400/5331cf6/3560f43/3807313023/VEsH/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/stop-denying-climate-science-rf?utm_source=feingold&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate") Friend, Today is my granddaughter Sylvia's first Earth Day, and my grandson Izzy's fifth. When my grandchildren are older, I'll tell them all about how the late Senator Gaylord Nelson, from Clear Lake, Wisconsin, founded the very first Earth Day in 1970. This year's Earth Day carries an important weight, one that wouldn't be lost on Senator Nelson. Leaders around the world are signing the Paris Agreement today. It's the most important agreement we've ever reached in the fight for climate action. But despite the overwhelming scientific consensus, despite its very real and present danger, and despite the will of a clear majority of Americans, congressional Republicans -- including my opponent, Senator Johnson -- refuse to acknowledge that climate change exists. It's time for Republicans to wake up and act. Our children and grandchildren deserve no less. **[Will you join me, the League of Conservation Voters, and several Democratic allies to call on congressional Republicans to take immediate climate action?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf427f/1c469400/5331cf6/3560f43/3807313023/VEsE/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/stop-denying-climate-science-rf?utm_source=feingold&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf427f/1c469400/5331cf6/3560f43/3807313023/VEsF/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/stop-denying-climate-science-rf?utm_source=feingold&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate") Wisconsin has a long, proud history of conservation and environmentalism. We're proud of our beautiful lakes, our clean air, and our clean water. We know that our environment doesn't need to be sacrificed to appease out-of-state corporations. We also know that we can create a clean energy economy, one that creates good jobs right here in Wisconsin. We must honor our legacy of environmental action by investing in our shared future, and that starts by acting to combat climate change. I hope you'll join me in demanding Senator Johnson and congressional Republicans act. **[Add your name: Call on congressional Republicans to act on climate change today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf427f/1c469400/5331cf6/3560f43/3807313023/VEsC/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/stop-denying-climate-science-rf?utm_source=feingold&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate")** Thank you for taking the time to act this Earth Day. Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf427f/1c469400/5331cf6/3560f43/3807313023/VEsD/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/stop-denying-climate-science-rf?utm_source=feingold&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=climate")

name: Stephanie Schriock
subject: I'm cheering her on
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Katie McGinty's up by three points in her Senate primary race with less than a week to go!

I'm cheering her on as the proud president of EMILY's List, a community of more than three million women and men dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women.

We've got an eye on flipping the Senate this year, and Katie's race is key to that strategy. She's the strongest candidate to take on Republican Senator Pat Toomey. If we're going to flip that seat, and the Senate, we need Katie on the ballot in November.

[**Katie needs all of our support to pull ahead and win her razor-close primary on Tuesday. Donate now to help her win on April 26th.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8156733727985106944/5645848172606521344?refcode=e20160422.3&refcode2=e20160422.3nd&amount=25)

The most recent poll has Katie ahead by three points, 37-34. Her opponent, Joe Sestak, isn't taking kindly to the polls being so tight. He's even called Katie's support from progressive groups like ours winning in a "prostituted way."

That's not how I'd describe having unions, environmental groups, and other pro-choice advocates joining together to support a woman who led the White House Council on Environmental Quality and who's worked to cut property taxes and increase aid to public schools across Pennsylvania.

This is going to be a fight to the end, and Katie needs us all to do everything we can to help her win next week so she can take on Toomey in November.

[**Donate now to help Katie break the tie, win her primary, and keep fighting for Pennsylvania 's families.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8156733727985106944/5645848172606521344?refcode=e20160422.3&refcode2=e20160422.3nd&amount=25)

Thanks for standing with Katie,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

name: Maryland for Bernie
subject: Important: Venue change for Baltimore rally
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
Due to weather concerns we are switching venues for tomorrow's Baltimore rally.
**Please note the the new address** :
**A Future to Believe In Rally with Bernie Sanders
Saturday, April 23**
Doors open at 10:00 am
Royal Farms Arena
201 West Baltimore St, Baltimore, MD
**[RSVP NOW](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh")**
[**Click here for more details and to RSVP »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4wkjh")
This event is free and open to the public. Tickets are not required, but an RSVP is strongly encouraged. Admission is first come, first served. For security reasons, please do not bring bags, and limit what you bring to small personal items like keys and cell phones. Weapons, sharp objects, chairs, and signs or banners on sticks will not be allowed through security. Parking can be found in the Arena's parking garage on Howard St. Public is also encouraged to take any of the following public transit options: light rail to Howard St, MARC train to Camden Yards, MTA metro to Charles St, or MTA bus to Baltimore St and Hopkins Pl.
Look forward to seeing you there!
Maryland for Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

body:
| Friend - I can hardly believe it, but we're just days away from our Primary on April 26th. It seems like just yesterday that we started this journey to the Senate together and I'm so incredibly grateful for your support.

But this race is far from over. The hours ahead of us will decide the outcome of this election.

As Marylanders head to the polls on Tuesday, I want to ensure that they are not confused by my opponent's false SuperPAC attack ads.

We have five huge contests coming up on Tuesday -- the biggest is Pennsylvania with 189 delegates at stake, and the polls there are all over the place. One poll this month had us up by 27 percent, but another said our lead was only 6 percent.

Polls are unpredictable, but here’s one thing we know for sure: Bernie’s campaign is going to significantly outspend ours in Pennsylvania, just as they did in New York. They know they need to win big there -- if he doesn’t, he’s going to have to make some tough calls on what happens next.
